pages.title: Zavi — marketplace ops, run by the agents that run Upcar
pages.markdown:
![](https://www.zaviagent.com/hero/zavi-hero-light-bg.webp)

# Do 10x more on your marketplace with the team you have.

Zavi builds, grows, and runs your marketplace: seller onboarding, fraud and disputes, growth experiments, and daily operator updates.

Built by marketplace operators from

![Amazon](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/amazon.svg)![Meta](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/meta.svg)![Upcar](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/upcar.png)![Upwork](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/upwork.svg)![Airbnb](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/airbnb.svg)![](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/amazon.svg)![](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/meta.svg)![](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/upcar.png)![](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/upwork.svg)![](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/airbnb.svg)

[Grow your marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start?seg=marketplaces) [Book a call](https://cal.com/ravi-zavi/30min)

## The first AI super agent for marketplaces.

Here’s how it works: you ask, Zavi acts, the outcome lands.

Check last week's signups and send a report?

## One super agent. The whole marketplace lifecycle.

Most tools do one slice. Zavi does the whole arc: build the product, bootstrap supply from 0→1, then run the growth engine to 1→n. Any marketplace, whatever you’re trading.

[Deploy Agent](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

Build0 → 1

Stands up your marketplace from nothing

Grow1 → n

Compounds liquidity once you're live

Run24/7

Keeps the marketplace running around the clock

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/slack-color.svg)Slack![](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/teams.svg)Microsoft Teams

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/logos/slack-color.svg)LIVE IN Slack

## Meet your AI teammate, live in Slack

Zavi works inside the tools your team already uses, reads the context, and drafts the next action in seconds, right where the work happens.

[Connect to Slack](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

\# project-updates![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/slack/chevron.svg)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/slack/member1.jpg)![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/slack/member2.jpg)12

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/slack/info.svg)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/sarah-jenkins.png)

Alex Rivera10:04 AM

@Zavi Hi, can you summarize the latest project updates?

ZaviAPP10:05 AM

Here’s a summary of the latest updates:

- • Frontend components merged into production
- • API documentation updated for V2 endpoints
- • Marketing assets finalized for the Q4 launch

✅ Approved💬 Discuss

🚀4🙌2

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/slack/emoji.svg)![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/slack/at.svg)![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/slack/send.svg)

## One super agent, a whole crew behind it.

You talk to Zavi. Behind the scenes it runs a crew of specialist agents for marketing, disputes, support, and engineering. You approve the big moves from one dashboard.

- Every specialist Zavi runs, in one view
- Approve money and message moves before they fire
- A company brain that compounds week over week

[See your Dashboard](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

## Describe it. Zavi builds it.

Rentals, services, products, or something weirder. If you can describe it, Zavi can build it.

RentalServiceProductOther

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/house-03.svg)

### Property rentals

Build a platform like Airbnb. Let people rent their homes, camping sites, pools, or office space.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/camera-video.svg)

### Equipment rentals

Help people and companies bring their equipment like machines, cameras, or camping gear online to rent.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/car-03.svg)

### Vehicle rentals

Build a marketplace like Turo where people can rent vehicles to each other.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/arrow-left-right.svg)

### B2B and B2C rentals

Create a site for companies to rent spaces, vehicles, equipment, or something else to consumers or each other.

[Build my marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/rental-right.webp)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/store-location-01.svg)

### Local services

Build a platform like UrbanSitter or StyleSeat and help local service providers like babysitters, cleaners, or hairdressers sell their services online.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/conversation.svg)

### Negotiation and bidding

Help customers get quotes from software developers, electricians or accountants like Upwork or Thumbtack.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/vr.svg)

### Virtual services

Let customers book online sessions with a life coach, tutor, or a domain expert.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/calendar-favorite-02.svg)

### Events and experiences

Build a platform like GetYourGuide or ClassPass for booking seats for tours and classes. Or finding tickets to events.

[Build my marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/service-right.webp)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/safe-delivery-01.svg)

### Selling used products

Build a second-hand platform like Depop or eBay where people can make money selling things they no longer need.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/product-loading.svg)

### Selling digital products

Create a platform where people can access content or other digital files from creators.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/store-02.svg)

### B2B product marketplaces

Build a platform for complex B2B transactions that need negotiation, contracts and bulk orders.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/package-open.svg)

### Selling new products

Let sellers to bring their inventory online and ship products to their customers like Etsy.

[Build my marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/product-right.webp)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/access.svg)

### Classifieds and directories

Build a directory or a classified ads site like Craigslist or Gumtree with different kinds of listings in multiple categories.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/billiard-01.svg)

### Matchmaking and recruiting

Build a job board, dating site, or any other platform for finding the right match among many.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/more-or-less.svg)

### Multiflow marketplaces

Allow services, rentals, and product-selling, all in the same marketplace.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/gift.svg)

### Bartering and gifting

Let your users swap things or services with each other – or give them away for free.

[Build my marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/other-right.webp)

## Growth, on autopilot.

Your super agent does not just keep the lights on. It grows the marketplace while you sleep: more supply, more demand, more repeat business.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/howzavi/column-bg.webp)

### Onboards supply

Recruits, verifies, and activates new sellers so your listings never run dry.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/howzavi/column-bg.webp)

### Runs your ads

Launches and tunes paid campaigns across Meta and Google, shifting spend to whatever converts.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/howzavi/column-bg.webp)

### Wins repeat business

Runs referral and retention experiments, then keeps the ones that work.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/howzavi/column-bg.webp)

### Plugs the leaks

Spots the funnel drop-offs quietly bleeding your growth and fixes them fast.

## Run your marketplace with a super agent thatworks 24/7.

- Start free with $100 in credits.
- No credit card, no sales call.
- Upgrade when you're ready.

[Get started free](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/icon.svg)See Zavi build

pages.title: Pricing — Zavi
pages.markdown:
![](https://www.zaviagent.com/pricing-bg.webp)

# Run your marketplace with a super agent thatworks 24/7.

Start free with $100 in credits.

No credit card, no sales call.

Upgrade when you're ready.

[Get Started For Free](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

### Team

$50

/mo

Shared workspace credits20,000Credits/mo

★

20KPopular12M

≈ 100 agent tasks / mo · Zavi and its full crew, shared across your workspace

Get Started for free

AllAgents

20,000Credits/mo

WHAT'S INCLUDED

Slack-native agent in threads + mentions

Persistent workspace context

Integrations + tool execution

Scheduled tasks & crons (reports, audits, proactive check-ins)

Drafts + artifacts (updates, tickets/docs where supported)

### Enterprise

Custom

Beyond 12M credits / mo · invoicing, security review, SLA

[Contact Sales](https://cal.com/ravi-zavi/30min)

AllAgents

UnlimitedCredits/mo

WHAT'S INCLUDED

Persistent workspace context

Integrations + tool execution

Scheduled tasks & crons (reports, audits, proactive check-ins)

Drafts + artifacts (updates, tickets/docs where supported)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/hero/zavi-hero-light-bg.webp)

## Credits power everything Zavi does

Credits are the fuel behind every action Zavi takes. Buy once and they apply across seller onboarding, fraud reviews, disputes, and operator escalations, so your marketplace keeps moving without managing separate budgets.

[Get Started for free](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![Zavi connected to Slack, Gmail, Jira, Excel, Microsoft Teams, Instagram, and Booking.com](https://www.zaviagent.com/pricing/credits-cluster.png)

### Draft Texts

Credits consumed per operation

100–300Credits

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/sarah-jenkins.png)

Sarah9:14 AM

summarize yesterday's #zavi-updates thread and flag anything I need to follow up on

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/zavi-icon.svg)

Zavi9:15 AM

3 Zavi deals reviewed. Two on track — Enterprise closes Friday, Growth plan signed. One needs you: DataSync integration went silent.

### Generate Variations

Credits consumed per operation

100–300Credits

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/pricing/kavin.png)

Kavin11:32 AM

Can you update the Zavi pricing page to $79/mo?

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/zavi-icon.svg)

Zavi11:38 AM

Done ✅ Updated the Zavi pricing page — Starter tier now shows $79/mo.

### Prototypes

Credits consumed per operation

2,000–5,000Credits

![Zavi building a property-rental marketplace — generated preview](https://www.zaviagent.com/pricing/marketplace-preview.png)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/pricing/phone-check-badge.svg)

## How credits work

Credits map to real model usage.

Smart caching brings them down.

Your whole team gets an analyst, an ops lead, and an engineer. For the price of lunch.

[Get Started for Free](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

Pay for what your super agent does

Every credit reflects the model work done across Anthropic, OpenAI, and others. No per-seat licenses, no minimums, no surprise platform tiers as you scale.

Smart caching cuts your bill

Zavi caches context and reuses results across tasks. Repeated workflows cost fewer credits than calling the models fresh every time.

Automations scale with frequency

Scheduled automations run on credits too. Frequency matters.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/cta-swoosh.svg)

## Build it, or grow it.  Either way, Zavi does the work.

Pick your door. You stay in control the whole way — the marketplace, the data, the customers, and the brand are always yours.

[Build a Marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

pages.title: About — Zavi
pages.markdown:
![](https://www.zaviagent.com/hero/zavi-hero-light-bg.webp)

About Zavi

# Building a marketplace used to take years.

We built Upcar the hard way, over years. Then AI made the same work move in days. Zavi is that speed: describe your marketplace and a super agent builds, grows, and runs it.

[Build with Zavi](https://www.zaviagent.com/start) [Started inside Upcar](https://www.upcar.ai/)

![Marketplace product mockup](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/rental-right.webp)

Build

Launch the marketplace surface.

Grow

Move supply and demand faster.

Run

Keep ops, support, and disputes moving.

Why we built it

## The future belongs to whoever moves at AI speed.

Not another tool to manage. A super agent doing the listings, campaigns, support, and fixes while you sleep.

### Property rentals

Build a platform like Airbnb. Let people rent their homes, camping sites, pools, or office space.

### Equipment rentals

Help people and companies bring their equipment like machines, cameras, or camping gear online to rent.

### Vehicle rentals

Build a marketplace like Turo where people can rent vehicles to each other.

### B2B and B2C rentals

Create a site for companies to rent spaces, vehicles, equipment, or something else to consumers or each other.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/hero/zavi-hero-light-bg.webp)

## Move at AI speed.

- From idea to live in days
- $100 in credits, no card
- One super agent, a whole crew

[Start free](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

## Describe it. Zavi builds it.

Rentals, services, products, or something weirder. If you can describe it, Zavi can build it.

RentalServiceProductOther

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/house-03.svg)

### Property rentals

Build a platform like Airbnb. Let people rent their homes, camping sites, pools, or office space.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/camera-video.svg)

### Equipment rentals

Help people and companies bring their equipment like machines, cameras, or camping gear online to rent.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/car-03.svg)

### Vehicle rentals

Build a marketplace like Turo where people can rent vehicles to each other.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/arrow-left-right.svg)

### B2B and B2C rentals

Create a site for companies to rent spaces, vehicles, equipment, or something else to consumers or each other.

[Build my marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/rental-right.webp)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/store-location-01.svg)

### Local services

Build a platform like UrbanSitter or StyleSeat and help local service providers like babysitters, cleaners, or hairdressers sell their services online.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/conversation.svg)

### Negotiation and bidding

Help customers get quotes from software developers, electricians or accountants like Upwork or Thumbtack.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/vr.svg)

### Virtual services

Let customers book online sessions with a life coach, tutor, or a domain expert.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/calendar-favorite-02.svg)

### Events and experiences

Build a platform like GetYourGuide or ClassPass for booking seats for tours and classes. Or finding tickets to events.

[Build my marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/service-right.webp)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/safe-delivery-01.svg)

### Selling used products

Build a second-hand platform like Depop or eBay where people can make money selling things they no longer need.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/product-loading.svg)

### Selling digital products

Create a platform where people can access content or other digital files from creators.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/store-02.svg)

### B2B product marketplaces

Build a platform for complex B2B transactions that need negotiation, contracts and bulk orders.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/package-open.svg)

### Selling new products

Let sellers to bring their inventory online and ship products to their customers like Etsy.

[Build my marketplace](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/product-right.webp)

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/access.svg)

### Classifieds and directories

Build a directory or a classified ads site like Craigslist or Gumtree with different kinds of listings in multiple categories.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/billiard-01.svg)

### Matchmaking and recruiting

Build a job board, dating site, or any other platform for finding the right match among many.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/more-or-less.svg)

### Multiflow marketplaces

Allow services, rentals, and product-selling, all in the same marketplace.

![](https://www.zaviagent.com/marketing/marketplace/icons/gift.svg)

### Bartering and gifting

Let your users swap things or services with each other – or give them away for free.

## How credits work

Credits map to real model usage.

Smart caching brings them down.

Your whole team gets an analyst, an ops lead, and an engineer. For the price of lunch.

[Get Started for Free](https://www.zaviagent.com/start)

Pay for what your super agent does

Every credit reflects the model work done across Anthropic, OpenAI, and others. No per-seat licenses, no minimums, no surprise platform tiers as you scale.

Smart caching cuts your bill

Zavi caches context and reuses results across tasks. Repeated workflows cost fewer credits than calling the models fresh every time.

Automations scale with frequency

Scheduled automations run on credits too. Frequency matters.
